input_file_policy: Use UTF-8 no BOM --input-json-file for non-empty or non-ASCII input; this workflow starts with {}.

target_scope.collection: Collected by the first approval gate and persisted under .lgwf/self_fix_request*.json.
target_scope.write_scope: Candidate repairs are limited to .lgwf/target_repair/current/workspace/candidate until promoted by the workflow.

resume_policy: Use the facade continue/resume/rerun flow for the fixed work_dir.
